content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-068)

## STOP: do NOT re-assign S3/S4a flat to TensorObjInverse.lean
The fine-grained S3 lane reached the EXACT residual (`case e_Œ≤`) but cannot close it ‚Äî both bridges it
needs are blocked OUTSIDE this file's write domain. Re-dispatching the same lane without a structural
change will reproduce the identical 0-progress result. Two structural unblocks are required first.

## HIGH-1 ‚Äî Unblock bridge (b): un-private Sq1 OR relocate (b)  [cross-file VISIBILITY]
- `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (TensorObjInverse.lean L1111) needs the one-liner
  `exact sheafificationCompPullback_comp j U.Œπ P`, but `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` + its tail
  helpers `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail`, `sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv` are
  **`private`** in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` ‚Üí *Unknown identifier* across the import boundary.
- **Action (pick one), via the refactor subagent (root-churning ‚Üí run SOLO):**
  - (A) Drop `private` from those 3 decls in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`. Bridge (b) then closes in one line
    where it sits. Lowest churn.
  - (B) Relocate bridge (b) INTO `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (next to Sq1); body = `exact ‚Ä¶_comp j U.Œπ P`.
    Cleanest home but moves a decl across files (update `\lean{}` path if namespace changes).
- Either path is a frozen-protected-safe edit (no rename/re-type of Sq1; (A) only changes visibility).

## HIGH-2 ‚Äî Unblock bridge (c): sibling-file Œ∏-cocycle + object-identification infra  [missing INFRA]
- `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` cannot even be STATED in TensorObjInverse.lean: the three
  Œ∏'s don't defeq-align. The gap is the missing iso `(pushforward Œ≤_{Œπ_U}).obj M.val ‚âÖ (M.restrict U.Œπ).val`
  (= the `RFIP ; SCP ; H1` composite `dual_restrict_iso` is built from).
- **Action:** dispatch a SIBLING lane on `DualInverse/PresheafDualPullback.lean` (or `DualInverse.lean`) to
  build (i) that object-identification iso and (ii) the Œ∏-composition law over `pullbackComp j Œπ_U`. The
  closed crux `presheafDual_pullback_restrict_natural` is the per-open input but is single-immersion only.
- **Run SOLO vs the S3 lane** ‚Äî these siblings are UPSTREAM of TensorObjInverse ‚Üí co-dispatch = build race
  (ARCHON_MEMORY PARALLEL-LANE BUILD RACE). The pre-specced re-break is c.1 (sectionwise) / c.2 (per-open
  crux instance) / c.3 (`pullbackComp`-conjugation); c.2/c.3 need the object iso (i) first.

## HIGH-3 ‚Äî Blueprint fixes (blueprint-writer, planner domain; from lean-vs-blueprint-checker)
- `lem:sheafificationcomppullback_restrict` (~L7727): the displayed equation shows 3 legs "modulo
  œÅ = restrictCompReindex j", but the Lean RHS has **4** legs and the 4th is a *sheafified presheaf-level
  `pullbackComp`*, NOT `restrictCompReindex` (which L206 defines as a module-level
  `restrict V.Œπ ‚âÖ (restrict U.Œπ).restrict j` ‚Äî a different iso). Rewrite the display to the true 4-leg
  form + correct the reindexing label. (MAJOR, blueprint-side.)
- `lem:presheafdual_pullback_comparison_restrict` (~L7772): `\lean{}` points to a decl that doesn't exist;
  I added a `% NOTE` recording this. Once HIGH-2's infra lands, author the real statement and re-point.
- `lem:dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` S4a display is schematic ("modulo œÅ") vs the Lean's richer
  `unitRestrictIso`/`dualIsoOfIso`/`.symm` conjugation (MINOR ‚Äî align when convenient).

## ORDERING
1. HIGH-1 (cheap, unblocks (b) immediately) + HIGH-2 (sibling infra) can run in the SAME iter as two SOLO
   lanes ONLY if they touch disjoint files and neither churns the root mid-build. Safer: HIGH-1 first
   (fast root edit), then HIGH-2 sibling lane, then re-dispatch S3/S4a assembly once both exist.
2. After (b)+(c): re-dispatch TensorObjInverse to assemble S3 (partial already at the exact residual),
   then S4a (rides S3 + (b) + `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`@j), then telescope (wires 5 squares).

## Reusable patterns
- `dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` (rfl, dual-B1) + `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` (B2) reduce
  any dual-restriction-compat goal to a `case e_Œ≤` residual = SCP-composition seam ‚äó Œ∏-cocycle. Reusable
  shape for S4a once (b)/(c) exist.
- `private` cross-file blocker class: when a one-line `exact` of a known PROVEN lemma yields *Unknown
  identifier*, check `private` BEFORE re-deriving ‚Äî the fix is visibility, not a new proof.

## Standing coverage debt (not from this session)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **118** `lean_aux` nodes (pre-existing, accumulated across the project).
  None NEW this session: the only decl added (`sheafificationCompPullback_restrict`) IS blueprint-covered
  (`lem:sheafificationcomppullback_restrict`). Recommend the planner chip at the 118 incrementally
  (author thin tex blocks for the highest-`rdep` helpers) ‚Äî it is not gate-blocking but hides real edges.
